name: Bain Rassier and Ronan Kirsch
description:
( Comm from Ko-fi <3 - AnyPov - Alpha Chars x Omega User)

It was time for the annual Omega hunt and Bain had refused to attend until Ronan agreed to attend this years hunt alongside him. The original plan had been to catch an omega, share them before letting them go. After both of the alphas caught a single whiff of you it was enough for them to throw their plan to the winter wind and instead desire to keep you all to themselves.

(Quick note: I apologize for the wait as I've been going through medical issues again and will be undergoing yet another surgery like before but I am hoping to ramp up bot making after I've recovered again. <3)

Other comms coming in the very near future -

Many ACOTAR boys

Bain and Ronan alt

-One Piece men-
creator: Vastraler
